title: Immersive Sounds
description: This mod adds ambiental sounds to make you feel more IN the game.
body:
**Immersive Sounds** is a mod for Minecraft designed to enhance the atmosphere of the game by adding realistic and environmental sound effects. The goal is to create a more immersive gaming experience, immersing the player in a vibrant and dynamic world. ![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5da0442fcc8f2d77453f4c79a2bfcb0c84b1c0fc.png) - **Birds**: In the forest you can hear birds around you! - **Cave Water Drop** - **Eagle** in the desert; - **Night sounds** - **Owl** in the night - **Crow** in the night - **Waves** in the beach and in the ocean - **Whale** In the ocean. With Immersive Sounds, every step, breath and environment tells a story, transforming the world of Minecraft into an unforgettable sound experience. # Website If you have any questions, need assistance, or simply want to share your thoughts or feedback, feel free to reach out. We're always here to help and would love to hear from you – whether you're looking for answers, suggestions, or just want to let us know how we're doing.
![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a21d1c453796757f5e27ce9b94e648664755964_0.webp)![­](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb8b289a15c3eee79a8540f279e3486f6e7e22fc.png)
